description.zh: GPA：3.94/4.00（排名 3/61）。荣誉：优秀毕业生、全国 VR 大赛一等奖。
description.en: GPA: 3.94/4.00 (Rank 3/61). Awards: Outstanding Graduate, 1st Prize in National VR Competition (NCVR).

text.zh: 发布 44 篇 Unity 教程（32.5 万+ 浏览），开源多个项目。
text.en: Published 44 Unity tutorials (325k+ views), open-sourced multiple projects.

text.zh: 完成 80+ 技术咨询订单，解决 135+ 个问题。
text.en: Completed 80+ technical consulting orders, resolved 135+ issues.

text.zh: 活跃于 Unity 官方社区与行业论坛。
text.en: Active in Unity official community and industry forums.
